item.title: Typo of the Day: Flirt Install 🤭
item.description:
I was trying to install a library using flit.

The correct command is flit install.

Flit is a simple way to package and publish Python packages on PyPI. You can read up about it in the docs.

They also have a “Why use Flit” section.

Typo of the day: `flirt install` 🤭

— Mariatta 🤦 (@mariatta) July 15, 2018

item.title: Typo of the Day: 👅 'Lick' 🖱️
item.description:
This is my first every “Typo of the day” post!!

I was trying to use the click library, which is a Python package for creating command lines.

😅 Typo of the day:
👅 'lick' instead of 'click' 🖱️

— Mariatta 🤦 (@mariatta) March 16, 2017
